title: symphyotrichum robynsianum
intro: Symphyotrichum robynsianum, also known as the Robyn's aster or Robyn's daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Symphyotrichum robynsianum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Symphyotrichum robynsianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical use, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
